title: Varangaon Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Varangaon with a Z-Score of +5.00. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current conditions in Varangaon are extremely hot with a critical level warning issued. 
 The heat wave has resulted in a CDD of 16.5 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 27% and wind speed is at 13.4 km/h, exacerbating the heat stress.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the heat wave's impact.
